author: hollowstrawberry
description: Reconnects to voice channels after restarting the bot.
install_msg:
🛜 __**AudioReconnect**__ ```Cog installed. Instructions:
1. Load it with [p]load audioreconnect
2. The bot will automatically reconnect after a restart in guilds where persist_queue is enabled in the audio cog.```
short: Reconnects to voice channels after restarting the bot.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store user data.
